subject: feat(debug): add auth and API debug logging to diagnose backend connection
body:
The "Connect a backend" message appears when the API call fails, but
the error is silently swallowed. This adds debug logging to auth init,
API requests, and the form list fallback so the actual failure reason
is visible in the debug panel.

Tags: debug, api, auth
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: backend-connection
Semver: patch
